title: More Commands
description: This mod adds 20 handy commands that weren't included in the original Minecraft.
body:
This mod adds commands that I have found useful.(Some commands need more permissions levels.)
There may be a command you need.
## List of commands to be added.
- /repeat --- Repeat the command for the specified number of times.
- /shape --- The specified command is executed at each coordinate that enters the specified sphere.
- /cube --- Rectangular version of the above.
- /health --- Set the health of the entity.
- /attack --- Sets the attack target for the specified entity.
- /flight --- Allows or prohibits the specified players to fly.
- /build --- Allows or prohibits the specified players to build.
- /explode --- Causes an explosion of specified power.
- /drop --- Summons specified items. (with the item being dropped)
- /exporb --- Summons a specified amount of experience orbs.
- /lightning --- Throw down the thunder.
- /falling_block --- Summons the designated block as a falling block. (as sand or gravel)
- /light_level --- Obtains the light source level at the specified coordinates.
- /cooldown --- Sets the cooldown of the item for the specified player..
- /items_damage --- Damages items held by the specified entity. (Negative values will restore the durability value.)
- /abb ---You can use abbreviations of some of the existing commands.
- /abbhelp --- Display of a list of abbreviations for the above commands.
- /as --- The specified command is executed from the specified entity.
- /clearitems --- Erase dropped items that exist in the dimension.
- /randomenchant --- Attach a random enchantment to an item held by the specified entity. (Same as the enchantment table.)
